title: (Not A) Bee SMP
body:
This SMP Modpack centers around the use of Create and Botania, a new dimension, The Bumblezone as well as as QoL enhancements to the overall vanilla experience.

 

This pack's main focus is around cooperation and construction to create settlements that can be connected using Create's Train systems. Future updates will add an economy, more farming, armors, weapons, tools and more!

 

BEFORE DOWNLOADING, Please Check the changelog of the version you download as some mods are not included in the pack download and must be downloaded manually as they are not available on Modrinth. Those links will be provided in the log.
